title: Polish /walkthrough skill for pipeline testing
description: Polish the /walkthrough skill to serve as the testing tool for pipeline changes. Add pipeline-specific standing scenarios and enhance CTO trace step for doc consistency verification.

in: Add pipeline-specific standing scenarios to scenarios.md
Enhance CTO trace step to verify doc consistency (cross-references, schema alignment, validation scripts)
out: No changes to /directive pipeline docs — that's project 2

dod.criterion: 5 new pipeline-specific standing scenarios exist in scenarios.md with full critical paths
CTO trace step in SKILL.md includes doc-consistency checks (cross-references, schema-template alignment, validation coverage)
Walkthrough report template surfaces doc-consistency findings in a dedicated section

tasks.title: Add 5 pipeline-specific standing scenarios to scenarios.md
tasks.user_scenario: When the team runs /walkthrough all or /walkthrough directive-intent-extraction, they get pipeline-focused scenarios that test intent propagation, builder context, review fix cycles, and completion gate behavior.
tasks.scope: Add 5 new scenarios to .context/lessons/scenarios.md: directive-intent-extraction, builder-context-completeness, review-fix-cycle, completion-checklist, pipeline-smoke-test. Each with actor, trigger, goal, critical_path (4-7 steps), success_criteria.

dod.criterion: scenarios.md contains all 5 new scenarios: directive-intent-extraction, builder-context-completeness, review-fix-cycle, completion-checklist, pipeline-smoke-test
Each scenario has all required fields: name, actor, trigger, goal, critical_path (4-7 steps), success_criteria
Critical paths reference specific pipeline artifacts: CEO brief, intent fields, builder prompt, code-review output, completion gate checklist
Existing 7 scenarios are unmodified — new scenarios are appended after them

tasks.title: Enhance CTO trace step in SKILL.md with doc-consistency and schema verification
tasks.user_scenario: When the CTO traces implementation during a walkthrough, they also verify pipeline doc cross-references, schema-template alignment, and validation script coverage — producing concrete evidence of doc drift.
tasks.scope: Modify Step 3 in .claude/skills/walkthrough/SKILL.md. Add doc-consistency checks to CTO trace instructions and output JSON schema with cross_ref_issues, schema_drift, validation_gaps arrays.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md Step 3 CTO trace prompt includes instructions to check doc cross-references, schema-to-template alignment, and validation script coverage
CTO output JSON schema includes doc_consistency block with cross_ref_issues, schema_drift, and validation_gaps arrays
Instructions tell the CTO to read actual file contents (Grep/Read) to verify — not guess
Existing trace functionality (actual_flow, gaps_found, working_well) is preserved unchanged

tasks.title: Update gap synthesis and report template to surface doc-consistency findings
tasks.user_scenario: When the walkthrough report is presented, doc-consistency issues appear in a dedicated section alongside the existing gap report.
tasks.scope: Update Steps 4 and 5 in walkthrough SKILL.md. Add consolidation of doc_consistency findings in synthesis and a conditional Doc Consistency section in the report template.

dod.criterion: Step 4 synthesis includes deduplication of doc_consistency findings across scenario traces
Step 5 report template includes a Doc Consistency section showing cross_ref_issues, schema_drift, and validation_gaps with file evidence
Doc Consistency section is conditional — only rendered when findings exist
Existing gap synthesis and report sections (Gaps Found, Systemic Gaps, Working Well, Summary) are preserved unchanged
